steps.title: Find the causal connection
steps.content: The observation raised questions, and then the team conducted an investigation to address those questions. The blank should express what initiated the study.

steps.title: Select the causal relationship
steps.content:
”Prompted by” expresses this causation—the observation prompted (initiated) the study. The other three either fail to express causation (“released in,” “acknowledged in”) or contradict the logic (“excluded by”).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
